$comment: Canonical backlog of action items only the founder can complete. Agents append/remove via commits to this file; scripts/sync_founder_actions.mjs renders the current state to Slack. Delete an item to mark it done.

items.title: Install Snippd Ops Slack app (one-time OAuth consent, ~90 seconds)
items.why: Replaces the blind SLACK_WINS_WEBHOOK_URL pipe with a proper bot. Unblocks: (a) identifying which channel the legacy webhook has been posting to, (b) auto-creating all 12 per-department Slack channels from .snippd/slack-channels.json, (c) agents posting to any channel by name instead of being stuck in one. Steps are in docs/slack-bot-install.md — install from manifest, authorize, paste xoxb- token into SLACK_BOT_TOKEN secret, run the slack-bootstrap workflow.
items.where: docs/slack-bot-install.md → follow the 5-step install, then https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/actions/workflows/slack-bootstrap.yml → Run workflow

items.title: Rotate STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
items.why: Secret was pasted in chat during Stripe setup on 2026-04-22. Must be rotated before the key is used in a committed Edge Function deploy.
items.where: Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys → Roll secret key

items.title: Rotate SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
items.why: Service-role JWT was pasted in chat on 2026-04-22. It grants full RLS bypass; rotate before it lands in any committed env file or deploy.
items.where: Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API → Reset service_role key

items.title: Optional: split Slack channels by topic (currently everything lands in the #wins channel)
items.why: All workflows now fall back to SLACK_WINS_WEBHOOK_URL as a last resort, so [app-review], [report], [action-needed], [provision], [approval] all post there with topic prefixes. Functional but noisy. Paste a dedicated SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL (any channel) and the wins channel stops carrying unrelated topics. Paste per-topic overrides (SLACK_APP_REVIEW_WEBHOOK_URL etc.) for full fan-out.
items.where: Slack → Apps → Incoming Webhooks → pick hub channel → copy URL → https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/settings/secrets/actions → New secret → name SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL → paste URL in chat and I'll set it.

items.title: Rotate SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN (pasted in chat 2026-04-22)
items.why: The management-API token was pasted in chat on 2026-04-22 to bootstrap the Supabase CLI provisioning. Standard hygiene: any credential touched by a human in chat gets rotated after first use. Functionally identical to the earlier STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + SERVICE_ROLE_KEY rotations. No rush — the token is already wired into GitHub secrets and does its job; rotating just closes the exposure window.
items.where: Supabase dashboard → Account → Access Tokens → revoke the 'github actions provision' token → Generate new → paste into https://github.com/godkingdombusiness/snippd/settings/secrets/actions (overwrite SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN). provision-neo4j and deploy-delete-account workflows pick up the new value on next run.

items.title: Generate Stripe price_id for Snippd Pro ($4.99/mo)
items.why: Edge Function Checkout Session path needs a concrete Price ID. Payment Link fast-path works without it today, but the robust path (with metadata + email pre-fill) is blocked until this exists.
items.where: Stripe Dashboard → Products → Snippd Pro → Pricing → Add price → copy price_…

items.title: Deploy supabase/functions/create-checkout-session
items.why: Upgrades the /pro page from Payment Link redirect to a proper Checkout Session. Requires price_id (above) + STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (rotate first) set as Edge Function secrets.
items.where: Supabase Dashboard → Edge Functions → Deploy from this repo

items.title: Decide IAP strategy for iOS: StoreKit vs External Link entitlement
items.why: Apple guideline 3.1.1: Stripe subscription for digital features = iOS reject. Before the iOS wrapper ships, pick: (a) Apple IAP via StoreKit with platform-gated payment UI (recommended — keep Stripe on web), or (b) apply for External Link Account Entitlement (uncertain, slow). Affects architecture of the /pro flow.
items.where: Strategic decision — then implementation on a wrapper branch (Capacitor or React Native).

items.title: Live-test /pro Payment Link end-to-end
items.why: Confirm the redirect to buy.stripe.com/… succeeds, payment clears, and Sentry breadcrumb 'stripe: Redirecting via Payment Link' appears on the user's session replay.
items.where: https://snippd.app/pro (or local dev) → click upgrade → Stripe-hosted page → test card if in test mode

items.title: Confirm Sentry → Slack alert rule is active
items.why: You confirmed earlier that the rule fired on a test issue; this is just a periodic re-check. If it stops firing the entire self-healing loop goes dark.
items.where: Sentry → Alerts → Rules → 'Slack #engineering-alerts on new Issue'
